reviews.school_name: Jaypee Public School - GAUTAM BUDDHA NAGAR
reviews.author: Anurag Rai
reviews.review_body: First impression is last impression , Despite of Good Facilities, Good management, the  missing chain  is admission  counselling team. No one will attend you.

reviews.school_name: Jaypee Public School - GAUTAM BUDDHA NAGAR
reviews.author: ANAND YOG Life
reviews.review_body: One of the Post modern school with happy blending of Science and spirituality with all round  trifarious physico psycho spiritual personality development of the children with creative Teaching methodology and innovative scientific activities along with Yoga Meditation and Creative workshops

reviews.school_name: Jaypee Public School - GAUTAM BUDDHA NAGAR
reviews.author: Shiv Prasad Singh
reviews.review_body:
Very good school. Good and experienced teachers for every subject. Impressive sports facilities including Golf.
School building is well managed, the playground is up-to the standards.
Regular interactions with parents on students progress.
Creative activities are also organized very well.

reviews.school_name: Jaypee Public School - GAUTAM BUDDHA NAGAR
reviews.author: Jyoti Tiwari
reviews.review_body:
An excellent school. Does not follow the usual rote system of learning.
A child"s mind is like a free bird...always wanting to explore and experience new things. The faculty and management encourage this.
Children are learning in a positive environment, where every child gets equal opportunity to perform and show their skills, thus building their self confidence.
